title: Example Graph DNA
purpose: Define why this graph exists and what development vector it must preserve.
evolution_vector: Keep the graph coherent, machine-readable, evidence-backed and useful for future implementation.
non_negotiable_principles: Every object must serve the parent graph purpose or be moved to a separate graph.
Generated artifacts are not source of truth.
success_criteria: Objects can be found and understood quickly.
Evolution tracks show what changed and why.
